articles.title: Dialogue of the day from Good Will Hunting, 'It's not your fault'
articles.description: A heartfelt dialogue from Good Will Hunting reminds us that healing begins when we stop blaming ourselves for the pain we never deserved.

articles.title: John Travolta health update: Cannes 2026 appearance has fans worried; 'he looks different'
articles.description: John Travolta sparked online reactions after debuting a striking new look at the 2026 Cannes Film Festival.

articles.title: Cast of ‘Boys Of Tommen’ OTT series adaptation
articles.description: Chloe Walsh's beloved 'Boys of Tommen' series is making its leap to the small screen with a thrilling OTT adaptation. 'Binding 13' and 'Keeping 13' will unfold the tumultuous journey of Shannon Lynch, played by Nancy Surridge, and Johnny Kavanagh, portrayed by Conor Sánchez, as they navigate their secretive romance amidst the pressures of Tommen College.

articles.title: Jyotika says women-led films in India don't get budget for other stars: ‘It’s only you; it’s a lot of work' | Exclusive
articles.description: Jyotika talks about her eight-year break from acting, the state of women-led films in the country, and more.

articles.title: Athiradi' BO day 2: Tovino Thomas film sees 23.4% dip
articles.description: 'Athiradi,' starring Tovino Thomas and Basil Joseph, is holding strong at the box office, raking in Rs 10.32 crore net domestically after its second day. Despite a slight dip from its opening, the film's engaging storyline and entertainment value, particularly its focus on college festivals and friendships, are driving its success.

articles.title: Tara teases 'Avengers' like scene in Yash starrer 'Toxic'
articles.description: Tara Sutaria shared exciting insights about Yash's upcoming film 'Toxic' at Cannes, praising director Geetu Mohandas and the powerful female roles. She hinted at epic sequences, comparing potential moments to Marvel's 'Avengers'.

articles.title: Sonakshi Sinha says overworking in her 20s led her to almost 'burning out': I would take no breaks | Exclusive
articles.description: Sonakshi Sinha talks to HT about how she learnt maintaing work-life balance in her acting career almost the hard way.

articles.title: 'Pati Patni Aur Woh Do' box office collection day 1: Ayushmann Khurrana starrer opens lower than Kartik Aaryan's 2019 hit
articles.description: Ayushmann Khurrana's 'Pati Patni Aur Woh Do' kicked off with a Rs 3.85 crore opening day, a figure that didn't quite match the level set by Kartik Aaryan's popular 2019 film. This Prayagraj-set situational comedy has received a blend of critiques, reflected in an occupancy rate of 11.94%. Currently, the film's worldwide earnings are at Rs 5.62 core. Read on to know more in detail.

articles.title: Exclusive - ‘India is one of the highest-demand markets for Live entertainment today', says EVA Live founder Deepak Choudhary
articles.description: Deepak Choudhary, founder and MD of EVA Live, told Moneycontrol in an exclusive interview that he believes the live events business in India is entering a transformative phase.

articles.title: Rubina Dilaik Hits Back At Trolls Saying 'Buddhi Ho Gayi Hai, Botox Karwaya Hai': These Are God-Created USPs - EXCLUSIVE
articles.description: Rubina Dilaik, in an exclusive chat with Zoom, opened up about facing harsh comments over her appearance and body changes after motherhood. Responding strongly to trolls, the actress spoke about self-worth and beauty standards.

articles.title: 31 things to do in Washington, D.C. this weekend: May 15-17, 2026
articles.description: From concerts and cultural festivals to baseball, theater and blockbuster museum exhibitions, the District is packed with activity this weekend

articles.title: Aalim refuses to work with celebs whose managers ‘mistreat’ them
articles.description: Celebrity hairstylist Aalim Hakim has taken a strong stand against toxic behaviour in the entertainment industry, announcing that he will no longer work with celebrities whose managers allegedly disrespect or mistreat creative professionals and crew members behind the scenes. His statement quickly struck a chord with several members of the film industry, many of whom extended their support in the comments section.

articles.title: ‘I want to be an actor, not a star...’: Simran Ashwini gets candid about experience on acting block
articles.description: Simran Ashwini speaks about her acting journey in Matka King, her training behind the scenes, and working with Nagraj Manjule while balancing life as a teacher, swimmer and performer across India and the US in upcoming projects.

articles.title: Quote of the day by O Henry: 'Life is made up of sobs, sniffles, and smiles, with sniffles predominating..' ; life lessons from American author
articles.description: Life is a tapestry woven with both laughter and tears, joys and setbacks, a reality O. Henry eloquently captured. His quote, "Life is made up of sobs, sniffles, and smiles, with sniffles predominating," underscores the inherent presence of pain alongside happiness.

articles.title: Rubina Dilaik Recalls Losing Friends During Rough Pregnancy, Says Only Jannat Zubair Stood By Her | EXCL
articles.description: In an exclusive interview with Zoom, Rubina Dilaik got candid about being abandoned by her friends when she was pregnant with her twin daughters. The actress cited Jannat Zubair as being the rare friend who stayed.

articles.title: Mackenzie Shirilla update: Where is she now after the double murder conviction?
articles.description: A teenage girl survives a 100 mph crash that killed her boyfriend and his friend but was it an accident or murder? Netflix's The Crash digs in.

articles.title: Toxic: Tara Sutaria Calls Working With Geetu Mohandas 'Joy Of Life', Reacts To Film Being Postponed
articles.description: Tara Sutaria, who is attending the Cannes Film Festival, recently opened up about her experience working on Yash's Toxic: A Fairytale For Grown-Ups. She praised director Geetu Mohandas and also shared her thoughts on the film’s delayed release and ongoing anticipation.

articles.title: Amjad Khan’s son Shadaab Khan recalls casting couch culture in Bollywood: ‘Big producers exploited strugglers, my father fought for them’
articles.description: Late actor Amjad Khan’s son Shadaab Khan has made shocking revelations about the darker side of the film industry, recalling how his father stood up against exploitation, withheld wages and alleged casting couch culture during his time as president of the Cine Artists Association. Shadaab admitted that being the son of the legendary actor was “a total disadvantage” in today’s industry and said the film world has drastically changed from what it once was.

articles.title: Purbayan Chatterjee, a rebel redefining Indian classical music
articles.description: Purbayan Chatterjee blending Indian classical music with jazz, rock and electronic influences, known for Shastriya Syndicate, Bandish Bandits and collaborations with Mark Lettieri, shaping contemporary fusion sound.

articles.title: Who did Drake diss on ‘Iceman’? Kendrick Lamar, DJ Khaled, LeBron James — Here’s the full list
articles.description: In his latest releases, Drake addresses rivalries and personal struggles, hinting at conflicts with Kendrick Lamar, J. Cole, and more.

articles.title: A room full of stars: Sanjoy Narayan writes on the Pitchblack Playback experience
articles.description: The idea of these deep-listening sessions is simple: A great album is played in full, in pitch dark, on a spectacular sound system, in collective silence.

articles.title: Saif Ali Khan | Rasika Dugal | Manish Chaudhari Interview
articles.description: In this conversation with Shreyas Pande, Saif Ali Khan, Rasika Dugal and Manish Chaudhari open up about their upcoming film, ‘Kartavya’, reflecting on their favourite crime-thriller tropes, Saif’s process of working on dialects, the advice he received from Amitabh Bachchan and Deepak Dobriyal, their thoughts on the current streaming landscape, and more

articles.title: Splitsvilla 16: Suzzane Calls Out Sadhaaf Shankar And Deeptanshu Saini's 'Fake Dating' - EXCLUSIVE
articles.description: Suszane opens up about the reality of Splitsvilla 16, revealing that Sadhaaf Shankar and Deeptanshu Saini’s dating was entirely fake. She exposes behind-the-scenes truths, highlighting how some relationships on the show are played for the cameras.

articles.title: Bad Bunny Asked Grace Ann Nader For Her Number At Met Gala 2026 But She Did Not Recognise Him
articles.description: Grace Ann attended the gala alongside boyfriend, Jack Jones.

articles.title: Chloe Cherry Reveals She’s Had So Much Lip Filler She Feels No Pain
articles.description: Euphoria star Chloe Cherry recently shared that she has become so familiar with the treatment that she no longer needs numbing cream before getting injections.

articles.title: Scarlett Johansson Goes Big, Finds Her “Chutzpah” in Family Crime Drama Paper Tiger
articles.description: Paper Tiger premieres on May 16 at the Cannes Film Festival.

articles.title: Today Breaking News | রাত ১১-টার বড় খবর | Suvendu Adhikari News | Vidhan Sabha News | ED News
articles.description: Today Breaking News | রাত ১১-টার বড় খবর | Suvendu Adhikari News | Vidhan Sabha News | ED News Abhishek Banerjee | তৃণমূল সাংসদ অভিষেক বন্দ্যোপাধ্যায়ের বিরুদ্ধে FIR।Suvendu Adhikari | বিধায়করা কে কী কাজ করছেন, কে বিধানসভায় যাচ্ছেন, সে ব্যাপারে স্বচ্ছতা রাখার কথা আগেই বলেছিলেন মুখ্যমন্ত্রী শুভেন্দু অধিকারী।আজ প্রথমদিনের বিধানসভা অধিবেশন থেকেই মুখ্যমন্ত্রী ঘোষণা করলেন, সাধারণ মানুষের জন্য বিধানসভার কার্যকলাপ লাইভ সম্প্রচারের ব্যবস্থা করা হবে। বিধানসভায় এক নতুন যুগের সূচনা করার বার্তাও দেন তিনি। Vidhan Sabha News | বিধানসভায় উত্তেজনা। বিজেপি-তৃণমূল স্লোগানযুদ্ধ। বিধানসভায় অধ্যক্ষ নির্বাচন। ওয়াকআউট তৃণমূল বিধায়কদের। বিধানসভার অধ্যক্ষ নির্বাচিত রথীন্দ্র বোস। ED News | জমি কেলেঙ্কারি মামলায় গ্রেফতার হয়েছেন কলকাতা পুলিশের DC শান্তনু সিনহা বিশ্বাস। বারবার তলবের পরও হাজিরা এড়ান। শেষ পর্যন্ত গতকাল হাজিরা দিতেই গ্রেফতার শান্তনু সিনহা বিশ্বাস। কে এই শান্তনু? তার বিরুদ্ধে কী অভিযোগ উঠে আসছে? n18oc_kolkataWatch LIVE updates from News18 Bangla covering West Bengal, Kolkata news. articles.title: BMC warns of action against illegal water pump use amid 10% water cut
articles.description: BMC warns of criminal action, seizures and disconnections for illegal motor pumps drawing excess water during Mumbai’s 10% water cut until monsoon.

articles.title: “Aakhri baar khul kar roe kab the?”: Security guard’s emotional confession about daughter’s bidaai leaves netizens emotional
articles.description: A touching social media video captures a security guard's heartfelt confession about his daughter's wedding being the last time he cried openly. He spoke of the profound bond fathers share, considering daughters a special blessing who bring immense joy and good fortune. His emotional words resonated deeply, highlighting that fathers, despite their usual composure, experience profound emotions too.

articles.title: Sonu Nigam meets Piyush Goyal to discuss 'Sangeet Dwar' initiative
articles.description: Singer Sonu Nigam met Union Minister Piyush Goyal to discuss the 'Sangeet Dwar' initiative, a single-window platform for music licensing. The meeting was also attended by Anup Jalota and other prominent industry figures.

articles.title: Ganga Meenakshi: From Hunger on Streets to Stardom, Mother Shares Painful Past!
articles.description: Social media star Ganga Meenakshi's mother, Rajalakshmi, has opened up about her past. She spoke about how her first husband abandoned her, forcing her and the kids to live on the streets. It was Ganga's stepfather, Manoj, who finally gave them a new life.

articles.title: Subnautica 2 Sells 2 Million Copies Within 12 Hours of Early Access Launch
articles.description: Subnautica 2 has sold 2 million copies in just 12 hours after its early access launch. The survival title released in early access on May 14 on PC and Xbox Series S/X. Subnautica 2 has also reached...

articles.description: Pati Patni Aur Woh Do movie review: Ayushmann Khurrana, Wamiqa Gabbi, Sara Ali Khan, Rakul Preet Singh film clothes it all in a modernity that can conceive women in jobs, women in open relationships, but not women whose life doesn’t revolve around a man.

articles.title: Mohanlal, Mammootty to Dulquer Salmaan; Malayalam film industry celebrates as VD Satheesan becomes Kerala’s new Chief Minister
articles.description: Malayalam cinema stars like Mohanlal, Mammootty, Nivin Pauly, and Dulquer Salmaan have congratulated VD Satheesan on his appointment as Kerala's new Chief Minister. The industry's prominent figures shared heartfelt wishes on social media, expressing optimism for the state's future development and leadership under Satheesan's guidance. Their messages highlight a significant political transition.
